info.name: Book Management API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Book Management System - TypeScript Backend

This collection includes all endpoints for:
- Authentication
- User Management
- Books & Inventory
- Categories & Authors
- Borrowing System
- Orders & Payments
- File Uploads
- Admin Dashboard

Base URL: http://localhost:3000/api
